sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Amt3) (Select KeyID + '-data2', Co, GL,TP, PC, BusCat, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )
update TransX set Flex1 = Field1, Flex2 = Field2, Flex3 = PC from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(GL,1,3) = Descr where keyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Table_ID = 'StatFXmove' and ID = 'GL'
update TransX set GL = Field1, Flex1 = Field2, Flex2 = PC from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on substring(GL,1,3) = Descr where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'StatFXmove' and ID = 'GL'
update TransX set PC = defaultpc from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where keyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PC = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Co = Descr where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'StatFXmove' and ID = 'PC0'
update TransX set PC = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Co = Descr and substring(Flex2,1,1) = Field1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'StatFXmove' and ID = 'PC1'
update TransX set PC = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Co = Descr and substring(Flex2,1,2) = Field1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'StatFXmove' and ID = 'PC2'
update TransX set PC = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Co = Descr and substring(Flex2,1,3) = Field1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'StatFXmove' and ID = 'PC3'
update TransX set PC = Field2 from TransX inner join Misc_Tables on Co = Descr and Flex2 = Field1 where keyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'StatFXmove' and ID = 'PC10'
update TransX set BusCat = substring(BusCat,1,1) + '0' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(BusCat,1,1) in ('2','3')
update TransX set TP = '' from TransX where keyID = '[batchID]' and not (Co = '2008' and TP in ('2300','2400','2450'))
insert into TransX (KeyID,Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, Flex1 as GL,TP, PC, BusCat, -Amt3 as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co,GL,TP, PC, BusCat)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt3 < 0
update TransX set Flex6 = '', Flex1 = '0', Flex2 = '0', Amt1 = '0', Amt2 = '0', Ledger = 'US', Crcy = 'USD', Txt = 'StatFXmove', TTY = '993', CC = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = cast(ABS(Amt3) as varchar(255)) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCat = '30' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = ''

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TP, PC, BusCat, Amt3) values ('[batchID]',
